===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Guzma Plumeria Adventures.png|thumb|270px|Plumeria in Pokémon Adventures]]
[[File:Plumeria Moon Adventures.png|thumb|left|170px|Plumeria disguised as Moon]]
Plumeria debuted in ''[[PASM14|Flash and Cosmog's Secret]]'', where she attacked [[Gladion]] after he arrived in [[Po Town]] in order to see if he was skilled enough to be Team Skull's Enforcer. Though Gladion proved himself, his negative attitude annoyed Plumeria, who refused to accept him as a true member of Team Skull.

In ''[[PASM17|A Raid and Po Town]]'', Po Town was infiltrated by five of Alola's [[Trial Captain]]s and [[Hau]]. Their presence alerted Plumeria and [[Guzma]], who demanded to know why their base was being invaded. When the Captains revealed they only wanted to talk, Guzma agreed on the condition they made it to him first. He then summoned a {{p|Pheromosa}}, {{p|Celesteela}}, and {{p|Guzzlord}} and had them attack the Captains and Hau, who were completely outmatched by the rampaging beasts. Annoyed the Captains were still fighting, Guzma used a {{p|Cosmog}} and had it open more wormholes to summon more beasts. Gladion appeared and battled the beasts Guzma summoned with his {{TP|Gladion|Type: Null}}. Gladion also revealed the [[Aether Foundation]]'s president, [[Lusamine]], was the one who gave Guzma Cosmog as part of her plan to create a paradise filled with nothing but Ultra Beasts and herself. To Plumeria and Guzma's surprise, a {{p|Xurkitree}} appeared from a wormhole and attacked them, knocking Plumeria unconscious.

In ''[[PASM23|Battle in Vast Poni Canyon]]'', Plumeria confronted [[Faba]] at [[Vast Poni Canyon]], demanding that he tell her where Guzma was taken to after he was kidnapped by a {{p|Nihilego}} that appeared from a wormhole. When Faba tried to feign ignorance, Plumeria revealed she had a {{p|Cosmoem}} that evolved from the Cosmog Guzma received from the Aether Foundation. Faba tried to take Cosmoem by attacking Plumeria, but his {{p|Hypno}} was defeated by her {{p|Salazzle}}. Immediately after, {{adv|Moon}} and [[Anabel]], a member of the [[International Police]], arrived. Faba, worried that his plans could be jeopardized, had the {{tc|Aether Foundation Employee}}s with him battle Moon and Anabel as a distraction. During the commotion, Cosmoem flew out of Plumeria's hands and into the air, where it encountered [[Nebby]]. While Faba chased after the two Cosmoem, Plumeria, Moon, and Anabel traveled by air and secretly followed his movements. Near the [[Poni Altar]], Faba revealed he knew he was being followed and attacked his pursuers. While Moon and Anabel dealt with the Employees, Faba told Plumeria that he help her find Guzma if she assisted him in taking over the Aether Foundation.

Six months later, Faba had successfully taken over the Aether Foundation, running it like a dictatorship. Later, Faba was informed by an Employee that Lusamine had returned to Alola after going into [[Ultra Space]]. Worried that Lusamine may have successfully captured {{p|Necrozma}}, Faba requested Plumeria help him fight her. Disguised as Moon, Plumeria was sent to [[Mount Lanakila]] in order to assassinate Lusamine with poison arrows, but her attempts were blocked by [[Lillie]], [[Sina]], and [[Dexio]]. Once Lillie contacted Guzma and convinced Plumeria that he was safe, she stopped her attack.
{{-}}
